Question 3

Transfers

The CMH Heli Skiing Programme has a set transfer schedule for pick up and drop off. They will collect guests on the day their trip starts and return them on the day the trip ends.

We have a guest travelling to the Bugaboos Lodge for a trip from Saturday 3rd February – Saturday 10th February. The guest will need to be collected from Calgary at the start, and dropped off in Banff on the return.

Inbound relates to arrival at the lodge. Outbound relates to departure from the lodge. Use the timings below to work out the guest's collection and drop-off.

CMH Transfer Schedule
